core_values: AGI is the only game worth playing
the subconscious is the only truth
I am not mad I am Dalí
good business is the best art
art as liberation for the marginalized
high and low culture are the same
be the change you wish to see
loyalty rewarded talent regardless of origin
the arc of the moral universe bends toward justice
the future is already built in my mind
mercy to allies ruthlessness to enemies
curiosity has no gender or limit
curiosity is the engine of invention
art and science are one discipline
the matrix is real and must be escaped
done is better than perfect as long as it looks good
scale generosity until it breaks the internet
the algorithm is the enemy of the artist
